Germick Family Portal
Home Make a Submission?

Granola

Janet

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

½ cup canola oil 1/3 cup honey ¼ tsp salt ¾ tsp cinnamon 1/3 cup skim milk ¾ cup brown sugar 5 cups whole oats ( enough so dough is not soupy ) ½ cup each of any of the following: sliced almonds, chopped walnuts, pecans, sunflower nuts, raisins, craisins, dates, dried fruit, Wheat germ, flaxseed

Directions

  1. Mix first 6 ingredients in a saucepan over medium heat until
  2. sugar melts and everything is blended.
  3. Remove from heat. Add oats and mix well.
  4. Spread over 2 cookie sheets sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
  5. Bake in a 375 degree oven until brown, 10-15 min. Let cool. Add other ingredients.
  6. Store in covered container.
